description:
Parent epic: V3 E5: Controls and human in the loop

Source task 9/9 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Decide whether `Jidoka.Hook` and `Jidoka.Guardrail` modules are deleted,
  renamed, or made private implementation details.

Epic closure criteria:
- Controls are the one public policy concept
- human-in-the-loop is demonstrated without new runtime machinery
- raising controls cannot crash the agent process

comments.text: Decided the V3 boundary: Jidoka.Control is the public policy concept, Jidoka.Guardrail is now hidden as implementation detail, and Jidoka.Hook remains documented only for lifecycle callbacks rather than policy decisions.

title: E5: Decide whether Jidoka.Hook and Jidoka.Guardrail modules are deleted, renamed, o...
